content_body:
Beautiful Blue Ridge, GA is a place to come home. Stay in one of our upscale luxury Blue Ridge cabin rentals that offer entertainment for the whole family. Enjoy Smart TVs, board games, fire pits, pool tables, foosball tables, and hot tubs. Our cabins are beautifully and thoughtfully situated to capture breathtaking views in these North Georgia mountains that the whole family can enjoy. Make sure to check out our kid-friendly cabin rentals! 

If you want to get out of the cabin for the day, there is so much to do in and around Blue Ridge. No matter the season, Blue Ridge has plenty to offer to the whole family.

Downtown Blue Ridge:

  • Blue Ridge Scenic Railway - take a train ride in an open car along the Toccoa River to the twin towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. Stand in two states at one time; enjoy shopping, dining, and more along the Toccoa River-turned-Ocoee River in Tennessee.
  • Escape Blue Ridge - Have a great time in Blue Ridge's escape room adventures with interactive clues and puzzles located in Downtown Blue Ridge.
  • Huck's General Store - Huck's offers fun inventory for young and old! T-shirts, Blue Ridge souvenirs, nostalgic games, puzzles, barrels of old-fashioned candies, and so much more! 
  • Vertigo Pinball - Enjoy a few rounds of pinball while the adults sip on a craft brew!
  • 2nd Story Entertainment - Indoor 18-hole mini-golf course inside a 111-Year-Old Hotel, featuring grass-type putting surfaces with real golf holes
  • The Swan Drive-In is one of only FOUR drive-ins left in the state of Georgia! Experience a movie or a double feature outside under the stars with concessions and lots of fun.
  • Blue Ridge Community Theater - Enjoy dramas, comedies, and musical productions, plus a 2-week children's acting camp (Sunny D's Childre's Theater) and performance during June.

Outdoor Activities:

  • The Lilly Pad Village - The all-time best place for the kids. The Lilly Pad is a true destination for families. Gem mining, putt-putt, pond fishing, ice cream, guided hikes - and, to top it all off, an outdoor cafe for the parents to relax by the pond! Our upscale cabin, Aska Escape Lodge, is within walking distance of the Lilly Pad Village in the Aska Adventure Area.
  • Tubing the Toccoa River is fun for all ages. Toccoa Valley Campground on Aska Road offers tubes, kayaks, fun yak rentals, and tube trips down North Georgia's beautiful Toccoa River.
  • Pontoon and jet ski rentals at Blue Ridge Boat Rentals - rent a pontoon or jet ski and spend the day on North Georgia's beautiful Lake Blue Ridge.
  • Swim at Morganton Point Recreation Area: Recreation area on Lake Blue Ridge with kayaking, paddleboarding, and swimming.
  • Horseback Riding - There are many choices for outfitters in the North Georgia area for a day of family fun riding horses. 
  • Fishing - Blue Ridge is the Trout Capital of Georgia. Blue ribbon bows and browns in the Toccoa River and private streams. Check out our partners at North GA Trout Fishing for a fly-fishing experience you will never forget! Also don't forget to visit the Chattahoochee National Fish Hatchery to see how our local trout are raised.
  • Hiking - Hiking trails abound in the area. A family-friendly waterfall hike to Fall Branch Falls is sure to satisfy you. Visit the Swinging Bridge over the Toccoa River for an easy, family-favorite hiking experience!
title: Family Things To Do in Blue Ridge, GA
